children.text: using the crossing is consistent with conditions the Secretary considers appropriate to ensure safety.

children.heading: .—Amtrak’s Share of Costs
children.label: b .—Amtrak’s Share of Costs
children.text: Amtrak shall pay 20 percent of the cost of eliminating each highway at-grade crossing under the plan.
